历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2023 was approximately 10089, in 2024 approximately 7267, and in 2025 approximately 6619. Rankings have moved forward (numbers decreasing) over the past three years, with a cumulative forward shift of about 3470, indicating increasing popularity year by year. The 2025 baseline is approximately 6619. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Ningxia: 4 in 2023, 3 in 2024, 3 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 8 (including 6 in Physics Category and 2 in Medical Category), an increase of about 167% compared to 2025. This substantial expansion should theoretically ease competition pressure, causing ranking numbers to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 177th (180th in 2025), showing a slight rise, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally, which attracts some candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving fan interference controversies in volleyball leagues and the university's management response, but overall public opinion is neutral. Douyin popularity ranks 18th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting considerable application attention. No obvious gaps in historical admission data. Fifth-round discipline evaluation data is not included for this university, but as the highest institution for sports in China, its sports science discipline strength is recognized as top-tier. Enrollment majors involve interdisciplinary fields such as journalism, psychology, and rehabilitation medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Journalism and communication majors are socially discouraged, foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see, and sports-related majors (sports rehabilitation, sports human science) are emerging directions with stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Ningxia is approximately 66000 (uncertain), a significant increase from 44491 in the Physics Category in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal for candidates from the northwest.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6619, the significant expansion of the science group in 2026 (plan from 3 to 8), and the notable increase in the number of local candidates: expansion causes ranking numbers to increase significantly (harder to enter), but the increase in candidates and high Douyin attention partially offset the expansion effect. After comprehensive balancing, the predicted 2026 lowest ranking is approximately 13188, with a range of 12688–13688.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 北京体育大学在宁夏医学类（康复物理治疗）招生始于2023年，此前年份未单独设置医学类招生计划。2023年最低录取位次为13566名，仅招1人；2024年位次大幅上升至7267名 （计划扩至2人）；2025年继续上升至6619名（计划保持2人）。2026年医学类招生计划仍为2人，与2025年持平，专业仍为康复物理治疗，选科要求首选物理再选化学。近三年位 次持续上升（更容易进），但增幅明显收窄，从2023→2024年上升6299名，到2024→2025年仅上升648名，表明位次趋于稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京体育大学是教育部直属的211工程重点建设高校，入选国家'双一流'建设高校名单，是国内体育类院校的标杆。学校在运动康复、运动医学领域拥有较强的学科积淀和行业影 响力，其医学类专业依托体育学科优势，在康复物理治疗方向具有独特培养特色。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 康复物理治疗属于医学技术类专业，近年来随着人口老龄化加剧和全民健康意识提升，康复医学领域人才需求持续增长，报考热度稳中有升。北京体育大学地处首都北京，地域 吸引力强。宁夏本省医学类招生规模较小，该专业仅投放2个名额，竞争相对集中且稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2023-2025年医学类位次持续上升但增幅收窄的趋势，以及2026年招生计划与2025年持平的因素，预计2026年医学类最低录取位次约为6589名左右，较2025年略有上升（更容 易进），波动区间预计在6389-6789名之间。建议考生参考此区间合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Beijing Sport University began enrolling students in the Medicine category (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) in Ningxia in 2023, with no separate enrollment plan for this category in previous years. In 2023, the minimum admission rank was 13566, with only 1 student admitted; in 2024, the rank significantly increased to 7267 (plan expanded to 2 students); in 2025, it further increased to 6619 (plan maintained at 2 students). In 2026, the enrollment plan for the Medicine category remains at 2 students, unchanged from 2025, and the major is still Rehabilitation Physical Therapy, with subject requirements of first-choice Physics and second-choice Chemistry. Over the past three years, the rank has been continuously rising (easier to enter), but the increase has narrowed significantly, from a rise of 6299 places from 2023 to 2024, to only 648 places from 2024 to 2025, indicating that the rank is stabilizing.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a key national university under the Ministry of Education, a member of the Project 211, and included in the national 'Double First-Class' construction list. It is a benchmark among domestic sports institutions. The university has strong disciplinary foundations and industry influence in the fields of sports rehabilitation and sports medicine. Its medical majors, leveraging the advantages of sports disciplines, have unique training characteristics in the direction of rehabilitation physical therapy.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Rehabilitation Physical Therapy belongs to the medical technology category. In recent years, with the aging population and the rise of public health awareness, the demand for talents in the rehabilitation medicine field has been continuously growing, and the popularity of applying for this major has steadily increased. Beijing Sport University is located in the capital city of Beijing, which has strong regional appeal. The enrollment scale for medical majors in Ningxia is relatively small, with only 2 spots allocated for this major, making competition relatively concentrated and stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of continuously rising but narrowing ranks for the Medicine category from 2023 to 2025, and the fact that the 2026 enrollment plan is unchanged from 2025, it is predicted that the minimum admission rank for the Medicine category in 2026 will be approximately 6589, slightly higher (easier to enter) than in 2025, with a fluctuation range expected between 6389 and 6789. Candidates are advised to position themselves reasonably within this range.
